title: ERCOT DAM ESR 60 Day CSV download
description:
Day-ahead market data for ESRs (Energy Storage Resources) in ERCOT. Includes cost-based parameters, unit capabilities, and ancillary service awards as well as capabilities. 

This data is published with a 60-day delay.

This dataset begins on 12/6/2025, the first day with a day-ahead market following the implementation of RTC+B.
